new_classes.label_en: sparkling other fermented beverage of heading 2206
new_classes.label_de: schäumendes anderes gegorenes Getränk der Position 2206
new_classes.definition_en: A fermented beverage classified under heading 2206 that is sparkling, i.e. has an excess pressure of carbon dioxide at 20 °C meeting the threshold defined in Additional Note 10 to Chapter 22, and that is presented with a mushroom stopper with tie or fastening or has an excess pressure of at least 3 bar, as further specified by the explanatory note to subheadings 2204 21 06 to 2204 21 09.

coverage_explanation: The key distinguishing criterion for CN 22060031 is that the fermented beverage (of heading 2206) is "sparkling" as defined by Additional Note 10 to Chapter 22. This note (not reproduced in the legal text snippet) defines sparkling by reference to excess CO₂ pressure thresholds and mushroom-stopper presentation criteria cross-referenced from subheadings 2204 21 06–2204 21 09. The proposed axioms capture: (1) the sparkling/carbonation property via isCarbonated hasValue true, (2) the excess pressure quality via someValuesFrom ExcessPressureQuality (already in TBox), and (3) the mushroom-stopper packaging criterion via someValuesFrom MushroomStopperPackaging (already in TBox). Coverage is partial (0.7) because the specific numeric thresholds for excess pressure from Additional Note 10 (not reproduced here) cannot be axiomatised without the full text of that note, and the sibling distinction between 22060031 (sparkling) and 22060039 (also sparkling, different sub-criteria or container) is not fully resolved from the provided legal text alone.
